programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: One on One With Steve Adubato
programme.desc: Professionals and innovators share their experiences.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Rebecca Hall and Lee Daniels research their family histories.

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: Archaeological investigations into the origins of democracy in Greece 2,500 years ago; mass graves and ancient ruins where tyrants were murdered shine light on the birth of a revolutionary form of government.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.sub-title: The Times That Try Men's Souls
programme.desc: British General Howe defeats General Washington, forcing the Americans to abandon New York; Washington's army regroups in New Jersey before attacking an outpost at Trenton.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: General Howe takes Philadelphia, but the Americans' surprising victory over General Burgoyne at Saratoga encourages France to support the U.S.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: Dalmation Coast; hiking through Plitvice Lakes National Park; Zagreb; Istrian Peninsula.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Pets and Pests; Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher; Binky, Muffy and Ladonna find a kite in the park.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: A Town Called Trifle; I Am Oddius
programme.desc: During the town of Trifle's 100-year anniversary party, Ozzie and Onom must stop Tracey Trifler from covering it in trifle; Osric and Omni try to stop a Roman gladiator from causing ancient oddness.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: The Kratt brothers use a new archery skill to rescue baby animals from Donita Donata's yacht.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters search for a way to monitor the weather after they lose power during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Cub Chuck Hustle; Lyla the Lefty
programme.desc: Lyla has to help multiple people but rushes each task, which makes things worse; Lyla must use her left hand after hurting her right wrist.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: Show and Smell; The Campfire Conundrum
programme.desc: Carl takes his friends on an "Amazing Smell Tour of Fuzzytown," but Lotta doesn't agree with Carl's list of the best smells; Carl and his friends go on a camping trip.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Learns to Ask First; Friends Ask First
programme.desc: Daniel takes a spoon away from Margaret, which makes her cry; Teacher Harriet explains that you should ask first before taking something away from someone.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay use Miss Jean's field guide to identify their new butterfly friend; Phoebe gets courage to perform at the talent show.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo tries to win a race without eating his sandwich, but learns that eating healthy food will give him energy; Cookie Monster tries to eat the sandwich for himself.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: Cause and Effect Machine; Riddles of the Treeborhood
programme.desc: The Wombats build a Cause and Effect machine; Super's best friend Chanaa pays a visit.

programme.title: Let's Learn
programme.sub-title: Can You Hear the "ar" in Car?
programme.desc: The social lives of animals; singing transportation songs; reading "Think Big"; reviewing r-controlled vowel ar.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.sub-title: Melting Point; Mr. Raccoon's Bad Day
programme.desc: While delivering chocolates, the kids learn that warmer temperatures can melt treats; the kids help Mr. Raccoon calm down when he is having a bad day.

programme.title: Cyberchase
programme.desc: The Squad uses math and engineering skills to fix scooters after they mysteriously break; Jackie tests her new fixing skills on a broken family heirloom.

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.sub-title: Sea Lion Crooks and Halibut Hooks; Nature's Medicine
programme.desc: While fishing, Molly and her cousin, Randall, encounter a sea lion with a strange word written on its back; Molly's scout troop halts its hike when Trini scrapes her knee.

programme.sub-title: I Am Confucius; I Am Sacagawea
programme.desc: Xavier and Yadina overcome a sibling spat with the help of Confucius; Sacagawea helps Xavier and Brad realize that just because Yadina is younger, she can do more than they think.

programme.title: Baking With Julia
programme.desc: Johanne Killeen prepares rhubarb upside-down baby cakes, hazelnut baby loaves and johnnycake cobblers.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom explains the architecture, installation, and maintenance of white cedar shingles; Richard explains common failure points in hose spigots and how to repair them; Jenn travels to Raleigh to help a couple with a self-watering vegetable garden.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hand-colored Andy Warhol lithographs; southern dolls, including an "Alabama Baby" doll purchased for 50 cents; Frederic Remington portrait with a letter from the artist.

programme.title: Shared Planet

programme.title: Wowsabout
programme.desc: Ronald, a meticulous, rule-following pig, and Roxy, a free-spirited musical hedgehog, explore the "wows" of one of America's most extraordinary places -- Sequoia National Park.

programme.title: A Life Reimagined: The George Masa Story

programme.title: The Making of the American Revolution
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at "The American Revolution" with Ken Burns, Sarah Botstein and David Schmidt to learn about the production, which took nearly a decade to complete.
